---
title: "Home"
---

# BIM Prototype 02

This is the Quarto website source for the BIM prototype project.

## Featured page

- [Wikidata Item Profile: Q138547468](wikidata-item.html)

## Changelog

### 2026-04-15

- Initialized the Quarto website and GitHub Pages workflow.
- Switched Quarto output to `docs` for publishing.
- Added a notebook-backed Wikidata item profile page with SPARQL-driven data rendering.
- Added reusable query/render helper logic in `wikidata_profile.py`.
- Added profile visual summaries and parameterized `item_id` input.
- See full details in the [Project Log](project-log.html).

## Next steps

- Add your project overview and goals.
- Add additional pages as the project grows.
- Publish automatically via GitHub Pages.
